comment: Synthetic extensive-stage SCLC, male 67, heavy current-smoker, ECOG 1, disease beyond one hemithorax with bilateral lung + liver + bone metastases, brain MRI clear. CLINICAL TARGET: IMpower133 archetype — REG-EP-ATEZO-SCLC (carboplatin AUC5 + etoposide x4 + atezolizumab maintenance, mOS 12.3 mo per IMpower133 Horn NEJM 2018). KB-DRIFT NOTE: KB contains BOTH REG-EP-ATEZO-SCLC (IMpower133) and REG-EP-DURVA-SCLC (CASPIAN), but IND-SCLC-EXTENSIVE-1L recommends only REG-EP-DURVA-SCLC. Per ind notes: 'NCCN considers EP+atezo (IMpower133) and EP+durva (CASPIAN) equivalent. Choice institutional.' Engine will route to IND-SCLC-EXTENSIVE-1L (default) and render the durvalumab regimen — the IMpower133 framing in patient_id/comment is the intended clinical archetype but the rendered Plan will print durvalumab. Tumor board may substitute atezolizumab per institutional preference using the existing REG-EP-ATEZO-SCLC entity. Flagged to KB authors as a candidate for a parallel IND-SCLC-EXTENSIVE-1L-IMPOWER variant.
